allow: Bash(cd /d/Projects/zeus-terminal/public/css echo "=== components.css remaining raw hex ===" grep -oP '#[0-9a-fA-F]{3,8}' components.css)

Bash(node -e "const http = require\(''http''\); http.get\(''http://localhost:3000/health'', r => { console.log\(''Express running, status:'', r.statusCode\) }\).on\(''error'', \(\) => console.log\(''Express NOT running''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const http = require\(''http''\); http.get\(''http://localhost:3000/health'', r => { console.log\(''Express OK, status:'', r.statusCode\) }\).on\(''error'', e => console.log\(''Express error:'', e.message\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const http = require\(''http''\); http.get\(''http://localhost:3000/health'', r => { console.log\(''express:'' + r.statusCode\) }\).on\(''error'', \(\) => console.log\(''express:down''\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const http = require\(''http''\); http.get\(''http://localhost:5173/app/'', r => { console.log\(''vite:'' + r.statusCode\) }\).on\(''error'', e => console.log\(''vite:down -'', e.message\)\)")
Bash(sqlite3 data/zeus.db "SELECT datetime\(MAX\(ts\),'unixepoch'\), datetime\(MIN\(ts\),'unixepoch'\), COUNT\(*\) FROM brain_parity_log;")
Bash(sqlite3 data/zeus.db "SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM brain_parity_log WHERE ts > strftime\('%s','now'\)-3600;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/zeus.db 'SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) AS rows, datetime\(MIN\(created_at\)/1000,'\\''unixepoch'\\''\) AS first, datetime\(MAX\(created_at\)/1000,'\\''unixepoch'\\''\) AS last FROM brain_parity_log WHERE created_at >= 1777129939000 GROUP BY source;')

Bash(sqlite3 data/zeus.db "SELECT source, symbol, COUNT\(*\) AS n FROM brain_parity_log WHERE created_at >= \(strftime\('%s','now'\)-3600\)*1000 GROUP BY source, symbol ORDER BY source, n DESC LIMIT 40;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/zeus.db "SELECT source, datetime\(created_at/1000,'unixepoch'\) t, user_id, symbol, decision, dir, ROUND\(confidence,2\) FROM brain_parity_log WHERE source='client' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")

Bash(sqlite3 data/zeus.db "SELECT source, datetime\(created_at/1000,'unixepoch'\) t, user_id, symbol, decision, dir, ROUND\(confidence,2\) FROM brain_parity_log WHERE source='server' ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 5;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header data/zeus.db "SELECT id, email, role, status, created_at FROM users LIMIT 20;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column data/zeus.db "SELECT id, email, role, status, approved, email_verified FROM users;")
Bash(sqlite3 -header -column data/zeus.db "SELECT id, email, role, approved, status, banned_until FROM users;")

Bash(sqlite3 -header -column data/zeus.db 'SELECT source, COUNT\(*\) AS rows, datetime\(MIN\(created_at\)/1000,'\\''unixepoch'\\''\) AS first, datetime\(MAX\(created_at\)/1000,'\\''unixepoch'\\''\) AS last, ROUND\(\(MAX\(created_at\)-MIN\(created_at\)\)/1000.0/3600,2\) AS span_h FROM brain_parity_log WHERE created_at >= __TRACKED_VAR__ GROUP BY source;')
